status: AUTHORITATIVE (examiner classes) — NY Title & Salary Listing + OER PS&T salary schedule
administering_agency: New York Office of Temporary and Disability Assistance (OTDA), Division of Disability Determinations (DDD)
salary_schedule_title: PS&T (Professional, Scientific & Technical) Unit Salary Schedule, effective March 27, 2025 (Admin)
title_plan_source_url: https://data.ny.gov/resource/t3vp-5tka.json (NY Title and Salary Listing, Open Data NY)
bargaining_status: PEF Bargaining Unit 5 — Professional, Scientific & Technical (PS&T); CBA April 2, 2023 – April 1, 2026. Examiner titles (Disability Analyst 2/3/4) are PEF/PS&T; the supervisory title (Disability Analyst 5) is Management/Confidential (M/C), not PEF.
step_basis: annual (NY publishes Hiring Rate (step 1) and Job Rate (top step); ~7 steps between)
notes: Title-to-salary-grade (SG) assignments verified from the official NY Title and Salary Listing (Open Data NY dataset t3vp-5tka). Dollar figures for the PEF examiner titles (SG 20/23/25) come from the official OER PS&T salary schedule effective 2025-03-27. IMPORTANT CORRECTIONS to prior notes: the current NY plan has NO 'Disability Analyst 1' or 'Disability Analyst Trainee' title; the examiner series is Disability Analyst 2 (entry), 3, and 4. The first-line supervisory class is Disability Analyst 5 (SG 62, M/C group). Hiring Rate = step 1 (minimum), Job Rate = top step (maximum).

Disability Analyst 2.basis: Authoritative — SG 20 verified from NY Title & Salary Listing; min/max are SG 20 Hiring/Job rates on the PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27

Disability Analyst 3.basis: Authoritative — SG 23 verified from NY Title & Salary Listing; min/max are SG 23 Hiring/Job rates on the PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27

Disability Analyst 4.basis: Authoritative — SG 25 verified from NY Title & Salary Listing; min/max are SG 25 Hiring/Job rates on the PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27

Disability Analyst 5 (supervisor).basis: grade assignment VERIFIED (Disability Analyst 5 = SG 62, M/C, per NY Title & Salary Listing); M/C SCHEDULE ROW PARTIALLY UNVERIFIED — the published M/C schedule lists rows 'M/C 3'..'M/C 23' then 'M 1'..'M 8' and does not print a row literally labeled '62'. Per NY's documented M/C convention SG 62 maps to the M-1 band (OSC PayServ manual: 'M/C grades 661 (M1) and higher'), so the M-1 Hiring/Job rates ($93,659/$118,388 eff 2025-04) are the candidate figures, but an explicit published SG-62-to-M-1 crosswalk was not located. Treat this row as a candidate, not fully authoritative.
